entries.title: P0.5 C-1 fix introduced a security regression: gated presets could be enqueued without work_id (PR #50 cursor review medium). Closed by fix branch fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass.
entries.source: PR #50 cursor automation review (medium); follow-up to V1.39 P0.5 C-1 fix
entries.note: Security: when preset declares gates, work_id is now REQUIRED; resolved from input.work_id OR seed.work_id; missing work_id fails closed with 422 preset_gates_failed. Regression test gated_preset_without_work_id_is_rejected added. Commit 3cc1601f on fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass.
entries.closure_note: Closed in fix branch fix/v1.39-preset-gate-bypass commit 3cc1601f. Gate-eval now resolves work_id from input OR seed; gated presets without work_id fail closed with 422 preset_gates_failed; regression test added.

entries.title: Research enqueue end-to-end test through supervisor/boot paths missing
entries.note: Add hermetic test that drives research through ScheduleSupervisor + boot resume paths.

entries.title: Research preset keeps work_init dropped; consider re-adding for standalone use
entries.note: List-friendly run_intents; defer until a standalone research caller exists.

entries.title: Status hint i18n extraction
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T4: deferred — full i18n pass beyond hygiene scope. Documented in research/preset.yaml. Commit 69250f10.

entries.title: enqueue_auto_chain_schedule hard-codes preset_version=1 in INSERT; latent hygiene
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T2: added preset_version_for_id() helper mapping preset_id to version from manifest. Commit c47d2125.
entries.note: Read preset_version from preset.yaml instead of hard-coding.

entries.title: AC2 end-to-end artifact assertion test missing (wiring-level only)
entries.note: Add a test that asserts a real research artifact file exists after research stage.

entries.title: Research preset run_intents work_init->knowledge_ingest impact assessment unverified
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T5: documented run_intents impact in research preset.yaml header. Commit 9dae01f4.
entries.note: grep codebase for work_init references; document result.

entries.title: Preset version: 2 bump on research lacks documented versioning policy
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T5: documented preset versioning policy in preset.yaml header and auto_chain.rs preset_version_for_id doc comment. Commit 9dae01f4.
entries.note: Add versioning policy comment or doc reference.

entries.title: Research status hint (creator run status) is free-form text; future i18n consumers need structured shape
entries.source: qc1 W-5 + qc3 W-3 (V1.39 P0.5 review)
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T4: deferred — structured research status is a UX slice beyond hygiene scope. Documented in research/preset.yaml. Commit 69250f10.
